title: Thirty-Seventh judicial district
doc_html:
§621.37.  Thirty-Seventh judicial district

The Thirty-Seventh Judicial District Court shall have one judge.  

Added by Acts 1977, No. 620, §24, eff. Jan. 3, 1979.
